name: Adams, Anna Grace, Xq.
motto: "My friends monopolize me so, They make me go where'er they please; They really interpret my life; It's well I have some enemies."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Albright, Chester
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Armstrong, A. B., Σae
motto: "I give every man a square deal and get the same from him. Life runs easy if you take it right."
description: Quite calm and deliberate, especially, deliberate.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Ashley, Louise, Xq.
motto: "O, mirror of noble womanhood."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Austin, Russell H.
motto: "He plows deep and straight with all his powers."
description: Takes long walks on Friday nights for exercise (?).
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Benton, Sidney W., Σφe
motto: "He is great who is what he is from nature, and who never reminds us of others."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_01.png

name: Best, J. Boyd
description: "Best" man in school even if he was a joke (editor) last year. He has a quiet way of saying things.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Boyd, D. T.
description: "A ready laugh and a wit to use." Don't speak or he might laugh. A rapid transformer, indeed.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Brown, Sarah Hazel
motto: "Just one thing has helped me in all, I've been thorough; I always maintain my detached point of view."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Cabe, Ethel
motto: "I value silence, none can prize it more, One reason—finished in less than four."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Cabler, Cleveland
motto: "His oratory would move a stone to sympathy."
clubs: Secretary of Tau Kappa Alpha and Delegate to Indianapolis Convention
description: Laughs and enjoys the world in his own way. He came from Henderson-Brown and got his degree in two years.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Callahan, Margaret
motto: "There's a certain little star I worship with a love devout; No matter what goes on up there. It never lets its fuse blow out."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_02.png

name: Campbell, William Peyton
motto: "Fusser as well as farmer."
clubs: Assistant to Commandant and Senior Cadet Major '16-'17
description: He is trying to prove that city folks can make good farmers, too.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Carmichael, Lentes
motto: "I always felt excited 'cause I have a grab bag sort of mind And when I reach down deep for thoughts I never quite know what I'll find."
major: Economics; B. A.; Delta Gamma Tau
clubs: Secretary of Freshmen and Sophomore Classes
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Cheever, Ed H.
description: A poet, though not many know it. He ignores trouble and woe.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Cochran, Maurice W.
description: A great shark but at what? Plays football and various other things. A good singer and a man "ready for his opportunity."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Craig, A. H.
description: A business man is right. Popular with the ladies and gentle in manners but firm in reality.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Curnutt, Hugh A.
description: He prefers to be good rather than seem so. One who will let "the good fellowship of college broaden into after life."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_03.png

name: Daniels, Fannie
description: Great feelings hath she of her own, Which lesser souls may never know.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Ferguson, Christelle
motto: "I read reviews and try to keep informed For ignorance embarrasses me so, And then when I'm invited out to dine They never talk about the things I know."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Fisher, Merlin
description: A jolly good fellow and popular enough. Believes that "politeness costs nothing and gains everything."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Ford, Clarence B.
motto: "I exist as I am, that is enough."
description: A politician pure and simple. Eligible for Presidency of "Sphinx."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Gilmore, Lucille
description: She does not agree that the phrase "Silence is golden," is trite.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Gorg, Raymond A.
motto: "Here's manliness of manhood, a man that has a will for doing what he does."
description: A new man but respected by all.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_04.png

name: Greenhaw, Mary German
motto: "Karl's brother and therefore brilliant and well versed in law (and other things)."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Harrington, Alice
motto: "A violet by a mossy stone half hidden from the eye."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Harris, Hadley
motto: "Like a lily which the sun, Looks through in his sad decline."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Henson, John H.
description: He believes that perseverance is a means of gaining knowledge, so is with us again. Entered at mid-term and began his work. Always wears a smile.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Hurst, Floy
motto: "If at first you don't succeed, Don't let failure in your heart, Stand back and look things over once And take another running start."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Huston, Mary May
description: For real information see the representative of the "Alberts Teaching Agency."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_05.png

name: Jelks, C. C.
description: Peculiar indeed but perfectly harmless. A football demon and one who thought he should have had more honors while in the University.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Jenkins, Catherine
motto: "In manners gentle, of affections mild, In wit a woman—simplicity, a child."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Jones, D. Webster
motto: "Good things come in small packages."
description: And this is no exception.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Johnson, Byron E.
description: Believes in many years of school work for "a well-turned furrow is one test of a good farmer; a well-trained mind is another."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Lawson, Hugh M.
motto: "Nuff said."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Lee, Arthur F.
description: A friend of the ladies but almost a bachelor this year. Some day he may reach his zenith (Zena).
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_06.png

name: Mather, Juliette Edla
motto: "Strictly Business" is her motto.
description: Miss Vaulx couldn't get along without her.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_07.png

name: McGaughy, John B.
motto: "What's the use of hurrying when there's plenty of time."
clubs: 1st Lieut. Co. B., Junior Class Football
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_07.png

name: McKnight, David A.
motto: "He is often the wisest man who seems not wise at all."
description: A good student and a hard worker.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Mendenhall, Ruby
motto: "A sensitive plant in a garden grew."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Miller, Paul Harwood
description: Another good judge. Quiet and unobtrusive but a brilliant fellow.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Mitchell, Emmett E.
motto: "Hath not the potter power o'er the clay?"
description: The man who discovers gold and other such minerals in the earth.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_07.png

name: Morton, Ruth
motto: "It's character that counts the most. With woes my path through life is stocked; But I am cheerful anyway— If folks notice how I act."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Myers, Carlton B.
description: A great manager of business, especially of newspapers. Wiser than most men think. The ladies all like him.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Norwood, Ellen
motto: "I don't get accustomed to living somehow; I welcome each day with fresh glee. I appeal to my own sense of humor so much That life is one long joke to me."
clubs: Vice-President of Y. W. C. A. '16-'17
description: Popular—and deserves to be so.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Oates, F. Bonner
description: "A careful student of the humble bug," and once studied a bird for consolation.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Overstreet, Elizabeth
motto: "This time of year seems very dull, It always drags a lot but then Spring soon will come and when it does, Perhaps I'll fall in love again."
description: Truly a "Mollusc"—ask "Mike."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Pape, Frank D.
description: "A woman must share the best of my life." Another shock absorber.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_08.png

name: Quaile, Beatrice
description: As full of tricks as her name implies, As full of wisdom as she is replies. After all, what matters the size, If quality's there for us to surmise?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Rawlings, A. J.
description: A baseball pitcher of no mean ability as well as a "prof." Spends half his time at "Askews."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Sailor, Vance L.
motto: "A man versed in the gentler arts, must needs next study law."
description: Learned to dance about three weeks before the Tri Delta dance. Wonder why?
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Scarlet, Winton C.
description: "Why?" his familiar expression. No, he's not the author of the "Scarlet Runner" but just a civil engineer.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Scurlock, Stella
motto: "I 'spose that I shouldn't aspire too much To a station of power and state. And still I don't know but I might as well try Because somebody's got to be great."
clubs: Representative to Student Council 1915-'17 and Secretary in 1916-'17
President of Y. W. C. A. 1916-'17
Member of Y. W. C. A. cabinet
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Sharp, James Edwin
motto: "Right noble in his merit for he has done the work of a man."
description: He is quite strong with the ladies.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_09.png

name: Simco, Allie
motto: "Beauty is truth, truth beauty."
description: She's in love again—this time with one Jackson.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Simms, Lucie
motto: "I wish we all would be sincere In every thing we talk about I 'spose that we are afraid to though For people then would find us out."
description: First in Dancing, First in the heart of ________.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Simms, Beatrice
motto: "Teach me half the gladness That thy brain must know."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Smith, Carr
motto: "And here is a nice youngster of excellent pith, Fate tried to conceal him by naming him Smith."
description: A wise judge.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Smith, Ruth Cleveland
motto: "Modest, yet with all an Elf."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Stevenson, James E.
motto: "Tall in stature, pleasant in mien."
clubs: Student Member Athletic Board of Control
description: The man who rode the steam-roller in '15-'16.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_10.png

name: Tanner, Joe L.
description: Was especially fond of French I for two or three years. Also plays some baseball.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Trimble, James W.
motto: "The reward of a thing well done is to have done it."
clubs: Student Secretary Y. M. C. A.
description: A man who has done more work possibly than any other in school. Finished at mid-term.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Walkup, Robert M.
description: A good fellow and a brilliant student. He never allows the girls to disturb his mind. "Bob" enjoys life and "labors on" for its reward.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Weld, Dana P.
motto: "Mind and muscle, brain and brawn."
description: He is more honorable than his honors indicate. Will make his mark as a chemistry shark.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_11.png

name: White, Eddie Sonora
motto: "Why beat around the bush?"
description: Quietness is her loudest feature.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_11.png

name: Wilkinson, Margaret
motto: "From thy presence showers a rain of melody."
description: Dr. Thomas is proud of her.; Margaret loved the Campus so well that she was always doing something against rules hoping Miss Davis would "Campus" her !!!
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_11.png; 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Willis, Robert B.
motto: "Farmers are the founders of human civilization"
description: and therefore Bob is striving to be a man that we are glad to call a friend.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Wilson, A. L.
description: Motorcycle lover. Delights in singing and dancing but will some day "shock" the electrical world with his genius.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Wood, James Roscoe
description: He had to come back this year—was El-(len)-ated to do so—and will ever "wear the rose of youth upon him."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Woody, Susan
motto: "Teach us sprite or bird What sweet thoughts are thine."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Wooten, William R.
description: A great yell leader and a "man who could build a church by squinting at a piece of paper." Made a dandy St. Patrick.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Zoll, Allen A.
motto: "Hi there."
description: Acts well his part and receives his share of class honors. A debater as well as a football player; also a lover of tricks (Trixie).
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_12.png

name: Amis, James W.
motto: "His tongue is that of a woman."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Bain, J. O.
description: "Jimmie" is small but speedy.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Bird, Milmo
description: Many a Freshman has he steered in the proper path.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Bishop, Mark
description: One of us who is sure to make a "Mark".
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Blanks, A. G.
description: He is all right in his way, but he doesn't weigh enough.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Brown, Hazel
description: A contented spirit is the sweet of existence.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Burrow, Frederick Hiram
motto: "A diamond in the rough."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Callahan, Jean
motto:
"'Tis well to be merry and wise,
'Tis well to be honest and true,
And pleasant, too, to think on."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Campbell, Kate
motto: "Her sensibilities are so acute she feared being silent makes her mute."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Campbell, Martha
description: Love is blind; she burned out her eyes striking matches on the east porch.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_13.png

name: Cantrell, Geo. A.
description: He never had a cold; is too slow to catch one.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Casey, Jno. E.
description: Entered the university in 1898 to keep out of the Spanish-American war.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Cherry, Robert
description: He ate "math" when he was a Freshman and still likes it.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Cherry, Rufus
motto: "At one time I thought all nights were for study, but not so now."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Clardy, Kelley
motto: "I judge so. Nuff said."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Clark, A. C.
description: If anyone is happier than "Fish" he has never yet shown up.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Clark, James A.
description: You can always tell when "Pat" is well made up by watching the dance floor.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Cole, Nellie
description: Of fair complexion and ways that make the "skin" the more attractive.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Craigo, Gladys
motto: "Charm strikes the heart, but merit wins the soul."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Daniels, J. B.
description: They call him "beauty," but don't ask us why.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_14.png

name: Davis, Jeff
description: Jeff has political aspirations and bids fair to be elected to something.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Douthit, Jesse
description: Owns the only "smoke wagon" in school.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Dowell, Gladys
motto: "I am not merry, but I do beguile The things I am by seeming otherwise."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Evans, A. O., Jr.
description: Is said to resemble the famous Robert D.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Faist, Herbert
description: "Dutch" has acquired much dignity since joining the ranks of the faculty.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Felton, Lula
motto: "Flattery is the food of fools, Yet now and then our woman of wit Will condescend to take a bit."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Fish, Roy J.
description: "Topwater" is always nibbling.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Gibson, Thomas A.
description: Became one of Prof. Waterman's pets by his brilliance in "Ec. 2."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Gilbreath, Bernice
motto: "Ah, what may a girl within her hide, Tho' an angel on the outside."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Gold, Marjorie
motto: "Cloudy the day or stormy the night, The sky of her heart is always bright."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_15.png

name: Goode, Fannie Belle
motto: "'Tis beauty that doth often make women proud. 'Tis Virtue that doth make them most admired."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Goza, H. D.
motto: "It was a cold day when I was on duty."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Grabiel, Ruth
description: Her tongue may be tied in the middle, but we know that it is loose at both ends.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Greaves, Bernice
motto: "She is a beautiful creature, depending on this beauty for much of her authority over her friends."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Hamilton, Scott
description: His main interests lie in the department of military science and tactics.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Harrell, Tracy
description: Was rushed for a prominent political organization, but turned it down.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Harris, Robert D.
motto: "Bob" is strong for brooks, especially "Hornibrooks."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Haynie, O. R.
description: Haynie gets more letters than anybody in school.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Hay, W. C.
description: Clifton's long suit is watches and work.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Heath, I. J.
description: 'Tis said that he never finished talking.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_16.png

name: Hemphill, Mary
motto: "Too young to love? Oh say not so! Too young? Too young? Oh no! No! No!"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Higgs, J. W.
motto: "He is in the matron's office."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Hollabaugh, Gladys
motto: "To see her is to love her, And love but her forever, For Nature made her what she is, And never made another."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Hon, Mildred
motto: "Cloudy the day or stormy the night, The sky of her heart is always bright."
description: Frailty, thy name is woman.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Howell, Ruth
motto: "A maiden never bold; of a spirit so still and quiet that her motion blushed at herself."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Illing, Leo M.
description: His steel stock has not materialized and he is waiting still for his ship to come home.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Irby, Guy
motto: "What did Br'er Irby say to little Miss Wolf?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Jacobson, Waldo
motto: "Don't touch the bristling pompadour!"
description: "Jake" is very "touchous" about his hair and claims that he has a right to be as it shows the result of many hours of brushing.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Johnson, Scott
description: Scott is king of the jokes.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Lanier, John T.
clubs: Candidate for business manager of the weekly
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_17.png

name: Leach, Luther O.
motto: "Let me wind my watch then I'll have time."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Leverett, Nona
motto: "Nobody loves a fat man," but not so with the "gentler sex."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: McCoy, Aileen
motto: "She was so charitable and so piteous She would weep, if she thought she saw a mouse."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: McCARTNEY, Norman
motto: What little time Mike isn't on East street he's going in that direction.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: McDonald, Dorothy
motto: There is not a more capable girl in school. Dorothy is always ready to do her very best, and her best is far above the ordinary.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: McIlroy, Mertye
motto: "Happy am I; from care I'm free! Why aren't they all contented like me?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Massey, Joe B.
motto: Never cuts a date.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Meadows, Coy T.
motto: "Sot" is there in a pinch.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Middlebrooks, Pearl
motto: Souls have complexions too; What will suit one will not suit another.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Milburn, Bryan
motto: If Bryan were not our editor we would be tempted to roast him for being a politician.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_18.png

name: Milburn, John B.
description: Would perhaps be a star at book selling in Rogers.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Mitchell, Wm. Moore
description: Is fond of Ec., but likes Mary better.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Moody, J. C.
description: Says that he would like to be akin to John Smith.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Moore, Verda
description: There is nothing ill can dwell in such a temple. If the ill spirit have so fair a house, good things will strive to dwell with it.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Morgan, R. E.
description: He cannot let his studies interfere with his college education.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Mullins, W. E.
motto: "Isn't it awful," he said and sighed, "How much space I have occupied?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Nelson, Irene
motto: "Oh! That this too, too solid flesh would melt."
description: Irene is entirely too thin (?) now.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Nelson, W. E.
description: A man made weary by the world.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Parker, Elmo L.
description: Head of the weather bureau in "Buck".
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Pedin, Orchid
description: Quiet and gentle is this girl of fair complexion.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_19.png

name: Pender, Roy
description: Roy is a good winner if he holds the cards.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Polk, Linda
description: Has great "weight" with all the professors and occupies as much time as she does room.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Porter, Paul L.
description: Paul is among the best of the best.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Ramsey, Adele
motto: "She is enamored of intensity and greatness; rash in embracing whatever seems to her to have those aspects."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Rankin, Fay S.
description: Fay is destined to make a preacher.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Reed, Reuben
description: Sleeps on one hill—and stays on another.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Reichart, Christopher
description: Says that he is going to take "Trig IV" next year.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Robinson, H. H.
description: Is usually "pressed" for time, but he never fails to say "Hello!"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Sailor, Lela
description: Nuf said.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Sanford, Bess
motto: "A foot more light, a step more true Ne'er from the heath-flower dashed the dew."
description: She is in love.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_20.png

name: Shadrack, William
description: A jolly good fellow. Usually seen around the "Hall."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Smith, Matthew M., Jr.
motto: "TOOT! Toot! Here comes the boy from Dallas."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Stevenson, E. E.
description: Won his letter in Fort Smith and lost it in Pottsville.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Taylor, Charles E., Jr.
description: I love school so that it is my plan to go over here as long as I can.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Torbett, Harry E.
description: Thrives on "bull."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Vineyard, Marion
description: A Vineyard near which "Boots" may always be found.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Wilson, William
description: Is Pat's roommate and they are off together.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Winfrey, George W.
description: The silent one.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Witt, Gibson, Jr.
description: Visions of luck pursue the boy. A Hot Springs product.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_21.png

name: Alexander, Margaret
description: "Oh, I just know I'm going to make a 'measley' grade in English II."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Allsopp, James Edward
description: A follower of Epicurus.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Alter, Glenn
description: Too bad that such a promising fellow has to live in such an environment as Hill Hall offers!
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Bailey, Frances
description: Well posted in the art of slinging chairs.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Bartell, Edward D.
description: Tall and handsome. Possesses a rich deep voice.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Baumgardner,
description: An agriculturalist, an engineer and a Sophomore.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Beard, Samuel J.
description: "Romie"—"Romeo" to the girls.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Bird, Beverly Ann
description: Holds the money for the Sophomores.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Bird, Marie
description: Short but sweet.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Bloom, Clarice
description: Translating German 2 c—"Jiminy Chris—?!"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Boone, William B.
description: An exceptional man, like other Boones in history.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Bossemeyer, C. O.
description: C. O. made the Glee Club a success; —but not in Fayetteville.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Bradley, James
description: A brilliant student, a fluent speaker and some president.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Bradsher, T. A.
motto: "I'll have nothing to do with tomorrow —I'll enjoy today."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Buchanan, Henrietta
description: Gregory had nothing on her as a "Papal" authority.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Campbell, Charles M.
description: Hurrah! One of the two Arkansas men on the Southwestern team.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Cantrell, Wm. Martin
description: Dr. Miser's math shark.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Clark, Glenn
description: Is strong for his home town—Malvern. Taking a pre-med course.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_22.png

name: Cochran, Paul B.
motto: "A handsome countenance is a treasure."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Coffey, Elizabeth
motto: "She believes in living now rather than in the hereafter."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Coleman, James W.
motto: "Wears an 'A' and worthily. He's afraid to go to Memphis now."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Conley, George Dewey
motto: "A lover of mechanics."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Conner, Laura
motto: "Let's go to big town." (B. T. F.) Big Town Fiend.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Chotard, R. C.
motto: "The French are a gay people, fond of dancing and light wines."
description: But Bob has deeper qualities.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Danner, John
motto: "He wears a perpetual blush."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Davidson, June
motto: "Dotes on movies and enjoys life."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Dibrell, Artilla
motto: "A maid who is quite contrary, Full of jokes and always merry."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Dorr, Clyde H.
motto: "Here, kind reader, is a man."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Dudney, W. Cross
motto: "My zenith was not reached on Oct. 20th, 1915."
description: Can be found most any time about 20 Hill Street.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Ellison, Fred
motto: "Faithful to Periclean, Y. M. C. A. and Agris."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Evatt, Blanche
motto: "She is a quiet maid—at times."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Faison, B. S.
motto: "Beau Brummel, our Criterion."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Fincher, W. E.
motto: "Had seen a year in Hendrix, but never a place like Buck Hall."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Fisher, Doris
motto: "Her lively looks a sprightly mind discloses."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Forrester, Charlie
motto: "Why should I blush to own I love?"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Freeman, Leslie
motto: "I ain't, nor don't pretend to be much posted on psychology."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_23.png

name: Furr, Beatrice
description: A dreamer of many dreams.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Gage, Margaret
description: She has a great big soul—it is worth your while to know her.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Gollaher, Gladys
description: A teacher to be. Loves to keep silent.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Grayson, Wm. M.
motto: "I never felt the kiss of love, Nor maiden's hand in mine."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Guthrie, F. E.
description: Big enough to defend himself.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Hale, Harvey S.
description: A very mischievous fellow. Steals apples and throws bread in the Mess Hall.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Hall, Willis
motto: "Father's pride and mother's joy—the light of the household."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Hall, F. Preston
description: "Pret" is a man of leisure.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Hall, Mabel
description: The like was never read of.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Hardin, Temple
description: Almost worshipped by lovers of the great college game.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Harding, Horace
description: "Hun" won his spurs playing in the Kid Band.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Harper, Constance
motto: "Did her father or her mother ever love her more'n me, Er her sisters or her brothers prize her love more tenderly?"—Scoops Craig.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Harris, Carolyn
description: She thinks too little and talks too much.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Harvey, Ruby
description: This girl is always very good, Though she'd cut up if she could.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Hays, Brooks
description: He likes to draw pictures and make speeches.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Hays, Hazel
description: Let gentlemen my strong enforcement be.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Heard, Roger
description: A dancing demon and a football star.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Herring, Gillis
description: But work is work and must be done, Yet, as I work I have my fun.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_24.png

name: Hilton, Amelia
description: Her parents moved to the "woolly" west, But for education—Arkansas is best.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Hinton, C. B.
description: Percy's little brother. His favorite color— White.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Hodge, Bess
motto: "Well sh-u-t up."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Hoepner, Clifford
motto: "On agin, Flanigin, off-agin."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Hoeltzel, Pauline
description: "Yeth, mam, I made only thix As, but then you know I take rolling 'extherthises' in the parlor every night."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Hollett, B. O.
description: His power of argument invincible, His power of truth, divine.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Keener, Edith
description: And "keener" lightnings quicken in her eyes.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Kernodle, Mary
description: Love to man's being is a thing apart; 'Tis woman's sole existence.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Lamberson, Mattie
description: Quiet and unassuming.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Landrum, John B.
motto: "I choose to write the things I durst not speak."
description: Our only short story writer who can compete with O. Henry.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Lee, Cornelia
description: Last and slowest would hurry, but she's afraid she couldn't stop.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Lee, W. M.
description: He is fond of his Coffee.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Lennox, Pauline
description: A spirit of mischief hid by a flowering face.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Lewis, Madge
description: Oh! I am a happy Sailor's girl.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Lipscomb, John
description: His home town ought to love him. John went 200 miles to help Bigelow win a county seat fight.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Little, Jane
description: She will have plenty of time yet to make a fool before she dies.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Little, J. J.
description: June and Nat Goodwin are in the same class. Both have made good.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_25.png

name: Logan, Robert R.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Lutterloh, Charles
description: Learned the rudiments at military school. Is known as "Son" to his Jonesboro friends.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Lyle, J. E. (James Esau)
description: And Esau was a cunning hunter. The only Agri who has majored in English.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Machin, Hughes
motto: "I love to work and play tennis."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Mason, T. A.
motto: "Looks well to the foundation."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Matthews, Earl B.
description: Is envied for his accomplishments.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: McCaleb, Maxy
motto: "Sometimes I get tired of study and then I like to loaf."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: McGaughy, J. P.
description: Demosthenes hasn't a thing on Jimmie.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: McGill, J. T.
description: "Oh, Coach! he may be bigger than me but he's not a Razorback."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: McLacklin, Roy
description: A draftsman of note.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Mixon, A. H.
description: A very quiet sort of fellow.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Moffett, J. A.
clubs: Blows a horn in the band
description: Alfred hopes to be a doctor some day. In the meantime he blows a horn in the band and majors in Biology.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Morgan, Gladys
description: If you think nothing—just keep on. But don't say it—e'er you're gone.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Monteith, Mabel
description: The stars in Math. 16 are not the only ones she studies.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Morrow, F. H.
description: As a crafty engineer, Franklin is superior. Exists in Gray Hall.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Mullins, Hugh
description: Young but gets there any way.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Neely, Virginia
description: If you want to arouse her feminine curiosity just ask her about Norman Smith.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Nesbitt, James
description: Jimmie tried to stay out this year and couldn't.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Nyegard, John W.
description: He is the only training school teacher who can make his pupils work at night.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: O'Bar, Blanche
description: My doctrine is to lay aside contention and be satisfied.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Oldham, W. K.
motto: "And now abideth scholarship, studiousness, and college pep, but the greatest of these is college pep."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_26.png

name: Payne, E. R.
description: "Boots" has to maintain the standard set by three older brothers at the U. of A.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Perdue, Gordon
motto: "The very pineapple of politeness."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Pierce, L. D.
description: Lewis overcame measles and mumps together. Controls the Harrison delegation.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Pyeatt, George
description: The boy from the suburbs of Cane Hill.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Prather, Marion
description: Oh, I chatter, chatter as I go to join the brimming "Brooks."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Pratt, Evangeline
description: Some nymphs there are too conscious of their face for life predestined to the gnome's embrace.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Ragsdale, J. G.
description: From his trim lips smooth elocution flows.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Ramsey, Gene
description: I was never deep in anything but love.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Reed, Courtney
description: I did my best to take the measles too.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Rice, A. W.
description: Came all the way from Minnesota to attend Arkansas University. Is trained in the art of wrestling.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Richardson, Jno.
description: John never misses drill. He will be in West Point some day.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Ross, Una
description: A kind heart, always fond and true, always jolly, never blue.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Russell, Jean
description: All fat is smooth and I am fat.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Sanders, C. B.
motto: "In the spring a young man's fancy lightly turns to thoughts of love."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Searcey, R. L.
motto: "In youth is the time to train the mind."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Sibley, Velma
description: Marriage for a great woman is a fall from dignity and ideals amounting to a deposition.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Shackleford, J. M.
description: Wins honors both on the field and in the classroom.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Shumaker, C. A.
description: Little but all there—Lover of the light fantastic.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Simmons, Una
description: If love alas be pain, the pain I bear no thought can figure and no tongue compare.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Simpson, Verdelle
motto: "Miss Peck said so."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Skaggs, Lester
motto: "Neat, not gaudy."
description: A student of the substantial sort.
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_27.png

name: Smith, Isabella
motto: "I like not only to be loved, But to be told I am loved."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Smith, L. P.
motto: "Ruddy, rough and ready. Takes care of himself."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Smith, Velma
motto: "Her stature tall. I hate a dumpy woman."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Sparks, John
motto: "Was ruled ineligible but he couldn't resist the temptation so he bossed the Freshman team."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Stewart, Olive
motto: "A genial disposition wins its owner many friends."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Styron, Mary
motto: "Jimmie is the 'Bane' of my life."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Suggs, A. R.
motto: "Too dignified? Not so. A man of experience."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Taylor, Beloit
motto: "Beloit did his part in the Sophomore-Freshman game. Wears a beautiful pompadour."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Taylor, Bess
motto: "She never told her love, But let concealment like a worm in the bud Feed on her damask cheek."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Townsend, H. W.
motto: "'On the top of that bald eminence, no capillary substance could vegetate.' A keen whistler and a German shark."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Turner, W. O.
motto: "The adroit engineer from the suburbs of Argenta."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Tyson, Lucile
motto: "You look wise; pray correct the error."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Vestal, Howell
motto: "Pretty eyes, pretty hair— Howell knows who owns them."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Vinson, Clyde
motto: "The scholar of the class."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Walker, Byrnes
motto: "Byrnes toots the horn—both literally and figuratively speaking."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Warren, Gladys
motto: "Quiet but always talks when around 'Dick.'"
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Watts, Elizabeth
motto: "Worth her weight in Irish potatoes."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: White, Emma
motto: "Some girls do and some girls don't."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Williams, Kate
motto: "She lived through a Freshman year of many terrors, but has no troubles now."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Wilson, Adele
motto: "When I am gone, wisdom will be no more."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png

name: Young, Estelle
motto: "I like fun and I like jokes, 'Bout as well as most o' folks."
image: 页面提取自－University of Arkansas_1917.pdf_页面_28.png
